//: Drop-in MCP server config for Claude Code. Two ways to install:
//install-a: Copy the 'cheapskate' entry below into the mcpServers object of your project .mcp.json (create the file at the repo root if it does not exist).
//install-b: Or run: claude mcp add cheapskate -- cheapskate mcp
//requires: The mcp extra: pip install 'cheapskate[mcp]'  (so 'cheapskate mcp' can start the stdio server).
